entries.name: MDS_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE_FILE
entries.title: Deployment profile file
entries.notes: Process-only override used by tests and custom deployments.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_PROFILE_ID
entries.title: Deployment profile id
entries.notes: Git-tracked fleet default; change through deployment/defaults.env.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_REPO_SLUG
entries.title: Default repo slug
entries.notes: Default repo owner/name used to derive documentation and GitHub URLs.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_REPO_URL_HTTPS
entries.title: Default HTTPS repo URL
entries.notes: Public/read-only default repo URL.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_REPO_URL_SSH
entries.title: Default SSH repo URL
entries.notes: Write-capable GCS deployments usually use SSH with a scoped deploy key.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_BRANCH
entries.title: Default git branch
entries.notes: Fleet default branch for new hosts and containers.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_REAL_GCS_IP
entries.title: Default real-mode GCS IP
entries.notes: Default GCS address for real hardware when a node does not override MDS_GCS_IP.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SITL_GCS_IP
entries.title: Default SITL GCS IP
entries.notes: Docker gateway used by SITL containers.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_GCS_API_PORT
entries.title: Default GCS API port
entries.notes: Fleet default. Host-local applied value is MDS_GCS_API_PORT.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_DASHBOARD_PORT
entries.title: Default dashboard port
entries.notes: Fleet default. Host-local applied value is MDS_DASHBOARD_PORT.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_DRONE_API_PORT
entries.title: Default drone API port
entries.notes: Fleet default. Node-local applied value is MDS_DRONE_API_PORT.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_DOCKER_IMAGE
entries.title: Default SITL Docker image
entries.notes: Git-tracked SITL image default.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_CONNECTIVITY_BACKEND
entries.title: Default connectivity backend
entries.notes: Default optional connectivity sidecar policy for new nodes.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_REPO_SLUG
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi repo slug
entries.notes: Documentation/display slug for Smart Wi-Fi Manager.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_REPO_URL_HTTPS
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi repo URL
entries.notes: Default Smart Wi-Fi runtime source.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_REF
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi ref
entries.notes: Pinned Smart Wi-Fi Manager version/ref.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_MODE
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi mode
entries.notes: Default sidecar mode for new nodes.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_IMPORT_MODE
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi import mode
entries.notes: Controls how fleet profile is applied by reconcile script.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_INSTALL_DIR
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi install dir
entries.notes: Node-local default install path for the optional connectivity runtime.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_DASHBOARD_LISTEN
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi dashboard listen
entries.notes: Default dashboard bind address for Smart Wi-Fi Manager.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_PROFILE_PATH
entries.title: Default Smart Wi-Fi profile path
entries.notes: Git-tracked fleet Wi-Fi profile path.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_MANAGEMENT_MODE
entries.title: Default MAVLink management mode
entries.notes: Default mavlink-anywhere ownership mode for real nodes.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_REPO_SLUG
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere repo slug
entries.notes: Documentation/display slug for mavlink-anywhere.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_REPO_URL_HTTPS
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere repo URL
entries.notes: Default MAVLink sidecar source.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_REF
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere ref
entries.notes: Pinned mavlink-anywhere version/ref.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_INSTALL_DIR
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere install dir
entries.notes: Node-local default install path for mavlink-anywhere.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_DASHBOARD_LISTEN
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere dashboard listen
entries.notes: Default dashboard bind address for mavlink-anywhere.

entries.name: MDS_DEFAULT_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_SKIP_DASHBOARD
entries.title: Default MAVLink Anywhere skip dashboard
entries.notes: Disables mavlink-anywhere dashboard on constrained nodes.

entries.name: MDS_GCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG
entries.title: GCS system env file
entries.notes: Process-only pointer to the host-local GCS env file.

entries.name: MDS_MODE
entries.title: Runtime mode
entries.notes: Canonical mode switch. GCS and nodes interpret it in their own local scope.

entries.name: MDS_PRESENCE_RECENT_LOSS_SEC
entries.title: Presence recent-loss threshold
entries.notes: Seconds after last fresh link before a node leaves recent-loss state.

entries.name: MDS_PRESENCE_STALE_SEC
entries.title: Presence stale threshold
entries.notes: Seconds after last fresh link before a node is treated as offline instead of stale.

entries.name: MDS_PRESENCE_LONG_OFFLINE_SEC
entries.title: Presence long-offline threshold
entries.notes: Seconds after last link evidence before offline state is flagged as long-offline in API details.

entries.name: MDS_GCS_API_PORT
entries.title: GCS API port
entries.notes: Canonical GCS backend API port. Deprecated GCS_PORT is not a canonical alias.

entries.name: MDS_DASHBOARD_PORT
entries.title: Dashboard port
entries.notes: Canonical dashboard HTTP port. Deprecated DASHBOARD_PORT is not a canonical alias.

entries.name: MDS_REPO_URL
entries.title: Runtime repo URL
entries.notes: Dangerous to edit from generic UI because repo access and deploy keys must match.

entries.name: MDS_BRANCH
entries.title: Runtime git branch
entries.notes: Change through setup/sync workflows until fleet dry-run apply exists.

entries.name: MDS_GIT_AUTO_PUSH
entries.title: Git auto-push enabled
entries.notes: GCS write-back policy. Drones should normally remain read-only.

entries.name: MDS_GIT_AUTH_TOKEN_FILE
entries.title: Git HTTPS token file
entries.notes: Path only. The token content must stay outside git and browser payloads.

entries.name: MDS_GIT_AUTH_USERNAME
entries.title: Git HTTPS username
entries.notes: Only needed for unusual HTTPS auth flows.

entries.name: MDS_GIT_SSH_KEY_FILE
entries.title: Git SSH private key file
entries.notes: Path only. Private key contents are never exposed through API/UI.

entries.name: MDS_INSTALL_DIR
entries.title: Install directory
entries.notes: Created by bootstrap; changing it means moving the checkout.

entries.name: MDS_VENV_PATH
entries.title: Python virtualenv path
entries.notes: Canonical GCS virtualenv path. Created by bootstrap; changing it requires moving or rebuilding the Python environment.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_ENABLED
entries.title: Dashboard login enabled
entries.notes: Enables browser login sessions. API bearer tokens are controlled separately.

entries.name: MDS_API_AUTH_ENABLED
entries.title: Machine API auth enabled
entries.notes: Requires provisioning bearer tokens for drones, agents, and field scripts.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_USERS_FILE
entries.title: Auth users file
entries.notes: Path to hashed dashboard users.

entries.name: MDS_API_TOKENS_FILE
entries.title: API tokens file
entries.notes: Path to hashed bearer token records.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_SESSION_SECRET_FILE
entries.title: Session secret file
entries.notes: Path to local session signing secret. Contents are never returned by APIs.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_CSRF_SECRET_FILE
entries.title: CSRF secret file
entries.notes: Path to local CSRF signing secret. Contents are never returned by APIs.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_SESSION_TTL_HOURS
entries.title: Session TTL hours
entries.notes: Clamped by auth runtime to a safe operational range.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_SECURE_COOKIES
entries.title: Secure cookies
entries.notes: Enable when the dashboard is served over HTTPS.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_CSRF_ENABLED
entries.title: CSRF protection enabled
entries.notes: Browser mutations should keep this enabled when dashboard login is enabled.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_ALLOWED_CIDRS
entries.title: Auth allowed CIDRs
entries.notes: Optional network allowlist. Empty means no MDS-level CIDR allowlist.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS
entries.title: Trusted proxy CIDRs
entries.notes: Only use with a trusted reverse proxy.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_ADMIN_USER
entries.title: Bootstrap auth admin user
entries.notes: Bootstrap-only convenience value; persisted users live in MDS_AUTH_USERS_FILE.

entries.name: MDS_AUTH_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE
entries.title: Bootstrap auth admin password file
entries.notes: Bootstrap-only file path. Password contents are never registry values.

entries.name: MDS_LOCAL_ENV_FILE
entries.title: Node local env file
entries.notes: Process-only override for tests and custom node env-file location.

entries.name: MDS_NODE_IDENTITY_FILE
entries.title: Node identity manifest
entries.notes: Machine identity manifest location. Do not batch-overwrite identities.

entries.name: MDS_HW_ID
entries.title: Hardware id
entries.notes: Never batch-apply this key; it is unique per node.

entries.name: MDS_GCS_IP
entries.title: Node GCS IP override
entries.notes: Node-specific override for the GCS address.

entries.name: MDS_GCS_API_BASE_URL
entries.title: GCS API base URL
entries.notes: Overrides host/port assembly for node announce and automation.

entries.name: MDS_GCS_API_TOKEN_FILE
entries.title: GCS API bearer token file
entries.notes: Path only. The token content is stored in a root-readable file.

entries.name: MDS_DRONE_API_PORT
entries.title: Drone API port
entries.notes: Node-local drone API port.

entries.name: MDS_CONNECTIVITY_IP
entries.title: Connectivity check IP
entries.notes: Defaults to resolved GCS IP.

entries.name: MDS_CONNECTIVITY_PORT
entries.title: Connectivity check port
entries.notes: Defaults to resolved GCS API port.

entries.name: MDS_INTERNET_CHECK_ENABLED
entries.title: Internet check enabled
entries.notes: Enables low-rate node internet reachability reporting in heartbeat network metadata.

entries.name: MDS_INTERNET_CHECK_HOST
entries.title: Internet check host
entries.notes: Target used for node internet reachability checks. Use an IP or DNS name reachable from the field network.

entries.name: MDS_INTERNET_CHECK_PORT
entries.title: Internet check TCP port
entries.notes: Optional TCP port for internet checks. Keep 0 for ICMP ping.

entries.name: MDS_INTERNET_CHECK_INTERVAL_SEC
entries.title: Internet check interval
entries.notes: Minimum seconds between internet probes; cached between heartbeat posts.

entries.name: MDS_INTERNET_CHECK_TIMEOUT_SEC
entries.title: Internet check timeout
entries.notes: Per-probe timeout for node internet reachability checks.

entries.name: MDS_CONNECTIVITY_BACKEND
entries.title: Node connectivity backend
entries.notes: Optional node-local connectivity runtime.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_MODE
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi mode
entries.notes: Node-local Smart Wi-Fi posture.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_IMPORT_MODE
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi import mode
entries.notes: Controls Smart Wi-Fi profile application behavior.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_REPO_URL
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi repo URL
entries.notes: Node-local override for the Smart Wi-Fi runtime source.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_REF
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi ref
entries.notes: Node-local Smart Wi-Fi runtime version/ref.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_INSTALL_DIR
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi install dir
entries.notes: Node-local Smart Wi-Fi install path.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_DASHBOARD_LISTEN
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi dashboard listen
entries.notes: Node-local Smart Wi-Fi dashboard bind address.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_SKIP_DASHBOARD
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi skip dashboard
entries.notes: Node-local Smart Wi-Fi dashboard disable flag for constrained hardware.

entries.name: MDS_SMART_WIFI_MANAGER_PROFILE_SOURCE
entries.title: Smart Wi-Fi profile source
entries.notes: Use repo: for fleet-synced profile or file: for node-local profile.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_MANAGEMENT_MODE
entries.title: MAVLink management mode
entries.notes: Controls whether MDS owns mavlink-anywhere on this node.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_REPO_URL
entries.title: MAVLink Anywhere repo URL
entries.notes: Node-local mavlink-anywhere source override.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_REF
entries.title: MAVLink Anywhere ref
entries.notes: Node-local mavlink-anywhere version/ref.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_INSTALL_DIR
entries.title: MAVLink Anywhere install dir
entries.notes: Node-local mavlink-anywhere install path.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_DASHBOARD_LISTEN
entries.title: MAVLink Anywhere dashboard listen
entries.notes: Node-local mavlink-anywhere dashboard bind address.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_ANYWHERE_SKIP_DASHBOARD
entries.title: MAVLink Anywhere skip dashboard
entries.notes: Node-local dashboard disable flag for constrained hardware.

entries.name: MDS_MAVLINK_PORT
entries.title: Custom MAVLink port
entries.notes: Advanced override. Prefer mavlink-anywhere profiles for routing changes.

entries.name: MDS_LOG_LEVEL
entries.title: Log level
entries.notes: Node-local logging verbosity.

entries.name: MDS_LOG_MAX_SIZE_MB
entries.title: Log max size MB
entries.notes: Per-log-file rotation threshold.

entries.name: MDS_LOG_BACKUP_COUNT
entries.title: Log backup count
entries.notes: Number of rotated files to keep.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_METADATA_CATALOG_PATHS
entries.title: PX4 parameter catalog paths
entries.notes: Optional local PX4 parameter metadata catalogs.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_ONLINE_DOCS_METADATA_ENABLED
entries.title: PX4 online docs metadata enabled
entries.notes: Allows bounded PX4 docs metadata cache for labels/groups/docs.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_METADATA_CACHE_DIR
entries.title: PX4 metadata cache dir
entries.notes: Bounded cache; pruning must prevent stale catalog accumulation.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_METADATA_CACHE_TTL_DAYS
entries.title: PX4 metadata cache TTL days
entries.notes: Reference metadata cache TTL.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_METADATA_FETCH_TIMEOUT_SEC
entries.title: PX4 metadata fetch timeout seconds
entries.notes: Short timeout keeps dashboard responsive on poor links.

entries.name: MDS_PX4_PARAMETER_METADATA_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES
entries.title: PX4 metadata cache max entries
entries.notes: Prevents stale/unused metadata cache growth.

entries.name: GCS_PORT
entries.title: Retired GCS port alias
entries.notes: Use MDS_GCS_API_PORT.

entries.name: DASHBOARD_PORT
entries.title: Retired dashboard port alias
entries.notes: Use MDS_DASHBOARD_PORT.

entries.name: GCS_BACKEND
entries.title: Retired backend selector
entries.notes: FastAPI is the only active backend.

entries.name: VENV_PATH
entries.title: Retired virtualenv path alias
entries.notes: Use MDS_VENV_PATH.
